responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the installed Expo React Native IVX Holdings app's real-device failures (diagnostic banner visible in production, `no_supabase_session`, Git SHA `local`, API env `unknown`), then build and ship a new APK with package `com.ivxholdings.app`

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` — that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports — redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- APK download links use `litterbox.catbox.moe` with 24h expiry
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in ALL runtimes (including dev/Expo Go), available only through Owner Control → Diagnostics with Close button and persisted closed state
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Production APK must never show Git SHA `local` or API env `unknown` — fail build if identity values missing

## Progress
### Done
- Build 14 APK completed, verified, and uploaded:
  - package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 14, versionName 1.4.3, 84MB
  - Embedded API URL `api.ivxholding.com`, Git SHA `11872578c4c8bd04ae22d90b8593035475117938`
  - Uploaded to `https://litter.catbox.moe/3cuemj.apk` (24h expiry)
  - Copied to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build14.apk`
  - `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` updated with build 14 details
- User tested build 14 and reported diagnostic banner STILL visible — screenshot showed `Runtime: dev-client`, `Environment: development`
- Root cause of build 14 banner failure identified:
  - `<IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics visible onClose={...}>` — `visible` prop was hardcoded to `true`, not bound to `diagnosticsBannerVisible` state
  - `runtime-environment.ts` misclassified bare-workflow release APKs as `dev-client`/`development` because `executionEnvironment === 'bare'` was treated as dev regardless of `__DEV__` flag
- Build 15 fixes applied:
  - `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: `diagnosticsBannerVisible` default changed to `false` (always hidden), `visible` prop bound to `diagnosticsBannerVisible` state instead of hardcoded `true`
  - `expo/lib/runtime-environment.ts`: Fixed bare-workflow detection — `isStandalone` true when `isBare && !devFlag`, `isDevClient` only when `isBare && devFlag`
  - `expo/constants/build-info.ts`: Fixed `readEnvironment()` to check `__DEV__` flag first, then runtime info; returns `production` for release bare-workflow builds
  - `expo/app.config.ts`: versionCode 15, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_15_DIAGNOSTICS_HIDDEN_PRODUCTION`, sourceCommitSha `d588155fd107fe5aa06395195a823fa7f8186301`, watchdogPatchVersion `ai-mutation-watchdog-fix-v6-banner-hidden-runtime`, frontendDeployMarker `ivx-frontend-2026-07-15-banner-hidden-runtime-fixed`, buildTimestamp `2026-07-15T03:21:16.787824+00:00`
- TypeScript passes (zero errors after build 15 fixes)
- Core test suite passes (378 pass, 0 fail, 0 error for unit/integration; 428 pass total with 1 Playwright e2e fail due to missing `@playwright/test`)
- Owner session fixes from build 14 remain in place: `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` removed from `lib/auth-context.tsx`, Supabase session persistence restored
- Supabase client audit complete: single singleton at `lib/supabase.ts`, no duplicate production client
- Owner AI auth state machine in `app/ivx/chat.tsx`: 6 states, send disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER`, sign-in banner for non-owner states
- Build info reads from `Constants.expoConfig.extra` (baked into JS bundle at build time)
- Watchman disabled (`chmod -x /usr/local/bin/watchman`) — root cause of all previous build timeouts, Metro uses polling fallback

### In Progress
- Building production APK for versionCode 15 — need `expo prebuild --platform android --clean` then `gradlew :app:assembleRelease`
- TypeScript and core tests passed for build 15 code changes

### Blocked
- EXPO_TOKEN not set in sandbox — EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set — defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to `github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`
- Render only accepts GitHub/GitLab repo URLs — Rork git router URL rejected, backend `/version` SHA remains `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on physical device

## Key Decisions
- Diagnostic banner default changed to `false` in ALL runtimes (not just production) — user was frustrated it appeared at all; only reopenable via Owner Control → Diagnostics
- `visible` prop on `IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics` must be bound to state variable, never hardcoded — build 14 bug was `visible` hardcoded to `true`
- Bare-workflow release APK (`executionEnvironment === 'bare'`) is `standalone`/`production` when `__DEV__` is false — not `dev-client`
- Watchman disabled by removing execute permission — was hanging 130+ seconds during bundling
- Building APK locally via `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` since EAS cloud is blocked
- Removed `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` entirely — was root cause of `no_supabase_session`
- Build info sourced from `Constants.expoConfig.extra` instead of `EXPO_PUBLIC_*` env vars

## Next Steps
1. Run `expo prebuild --platform android --clean` for build 15
2. Run `gradlew :app:assembleRelease` to build APK
3. Verify APK: package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 15, Git SHA `d588155`, API env `api.ivxholding.com`
4. Copy APK to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build15.apk`
5. Upload APK to litterbox for direct download link
6. Update `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` with build 15 details
7. User must test build 15 on real device — verify banner is gone, environment shows `production`, Owner AI works after restart

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD SHA: `d588155fd107fe5aa06395195a823fa7f8186301` (`d588155`)
- Previous build 14 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/3cuemj.apk` (24h expiry, may be expired)
- Previous build 13 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/kqxpnm.apk` (expired)
- Watchman at `/usr/local/bin/watchman` has execute permission removed — all Metro/Gradle builds work without hanging
- Metro bundler works with Watchman disabled — uses polling fallback, bundles 3850 modules in ~24s
- Gradle 8.14.3, JDK 17.0.13, Kotlin 2.0.21, Android SDK 35/36 build-tools available
- `aapt2` at `/home/user/.gradle/caches/8.14.1/transforms/.../aapt2` for APK verification
- Supabase production URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (project ref `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`)
- Owner userId: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`, role=owner, kycStatus=approved
- Render service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, commit `0b37191f`, 77 routes, deployment `dep-d9bed5j7uimc73a9t8g`
- `expo/metro.config.js` has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` and server-only package blocklist
- `rork.json` still points to `android-ivx-holdings` (Kotlin) — needs updating to Expo app

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app.config.ts`: Expo config — package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 15, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_15_DIAGNOSTICS_HIDDEN_PRODUCTION`, sourceCommitSha `d588155...`
- `expo/constants/build-info.ts`: Reads build identity from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`, `readEnvironment()` checks `__DEV__` first then runtime, exports `getIVXBuildInfo()` and `assertIVXBuildIdentified()`
- `expo/components/IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics.tsx`: Accepts `visible`/`onClose` props, Close button, reads from `getIVXBuildInfo()`
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: `diagnosticsBannerVisible` defaults to `false` (always hidden), `visible` prop bound to state, auth state machine with 6 states, send disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER`, sign-in banner
- `expo/lib/runtime-environment.ts`: Fixed bare-workflow detection — `isStandalone` true when `isBare && !devFlag`, `isDevClient` only when `isBare && devFlag`
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: Removed all 3 `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` blocks, owner sessions persist/restore
- `expo/lib/ivx-supabase-client.ts`: Exports `IVX_CANONICAL_API_BASE_URL`
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts`: Main Supabase singleton — `createClient` with `autoRefreshToken: true`, `persistSession: true`, AsyncStorage adapter
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json`: Updated with build 14 details (needs update for build 15)
- `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md`: Project plan tracking all tasks
